attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WGLRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WGLRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY IN (-9999,-6666) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1  WHEN WGLRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000 ,1011800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END SALES_ORDER_KEY , 
   CASE WHEN WGLRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN(-9999,-6666) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000 ,1011800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  , 
   CASE WHEN WGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY , 
   CASE WHEN WGLRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1  		WHEN WGLRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1  
		WHEN WGLRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1/* Added  as Part of CDC Q4FY18 Release */
	ELSE WGLRM.AR_TRX_KEY END AR_TRX_KEY  , 
	CASE WHEN WGLRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 
		WHEN WGLRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 /* Added as Part of CDC Q4FY18 Release */
	ELSE WGLRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,
	CASE WHEN WGLRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 
		WHEN WGLRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 /* Added as Part of CDC Q4FY18 Release */
	ELSE WGLRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY END BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WGLRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WGLRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WGLRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WGLRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
 , WGLRM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY 
 , WGLRM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
 , WGLRM.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
 , CASE WHEN WGLRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IN (-9999,-999) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
 , CASE WHEN WGLRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT=-9999 THEN RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
 , CASE WHEN WGLRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT=-9999 THEN RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT 
 , WGLRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 , WGLRM.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD 
 , WGLRM.DD_GL_DATETIME 
 , WGLRM.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD 
 , WGLRM.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
 , WGLRM.DV_FISCAL_DT 
 , WGLRM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD 
 , WGLRM.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD 
 , WGLRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
 , WGLRM.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD 
 , WGLRM.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD 
 , WGLRM.AR_TRX_DATETIME 
 , WGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
 , WGLRM.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD 
 , WGLRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG 
 , WGLRM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG 
 , WGLRM.DV_CHARGES_FLG 
 , WGLRM.DV_MISC_FLG 
 , WGLRM.DV_SERVICE_FLG 
 , WGLRM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG 
 , WGLRM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG 
 , WGLRM.DV_REVENUE_FLG 
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM 
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT 
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT 
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT 
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT 
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
 , WGLRM.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY 
 , WGLRM.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY 
 , WGLRM.EDW_CREATE_USER 
 , WGLRM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
 , WGLRM.EDW_UPDATE_USER 
 , WGLRM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME 
 , WGLRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
 , WGLRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD 
 , WGLRM.GL_DT
 , WGLRM.BK_SS_CD                        
 , WGLRM.DV_EXTENDED_QTY                
 , WGLRM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT      
 , WGLRM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT    
 , WGLRM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD          
 , WGLRM.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD                
 , WGLRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD   
 , WGLRM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY     
 , WGLRM.TRANSACTION_DT 
 ,WGLRM.GL_POSTED_DTM
 ,WGLRM.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT
 , WGLRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT
 , WGLRM.SPLIT_PCT
 , WGLRM.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 , WGLRM.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
 , WGLRM.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG
 ,WGLRM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
  CASE WHEN WGLRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-6666) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000 ,1011800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,
  WGLRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
 , CASE WHEN WGLRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  WHEN WGLRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1  WHEN WGLRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1  ELSE WGLRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END DV_PRODUCT_KEY    
 ,WGLRM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD   
 ,WGLRM.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID 
 ,WGLRM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD /*PRBOBBA: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
 ,WGLRM.DV_FMV_FLG, /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART FO FMV Q1FY15*/
 WGLRM.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 WGLRM.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT, /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 WGLRM.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 /*ADDED BELOW LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 ,WGLRM.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT
 ,WGLRM.DSV_FLG
 /*ADDED BELOW LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 ,  CASE WHEN WGLRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WGLRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1  
	WHEN WGLRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1  /* Added as Part of CDC Q4FY18 Release */
ELSE WGLRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY /*kdoppala: added as a part of OAQ1Fy16*/
 , WGLRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,       /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */ 
  WGLRM.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME ,   /* pneelraj : Added as part of Q1FY16 ICPM */ 
  WGLRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_2TIER_CMDM_AMT , /* derived as part of CE-CHINA-AUG CDR */
  WGLRM.XCAT_FLG, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 WGLRM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 WGLRM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 WGLRM.ELA_FLG,  /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
CASE WHEN WGLRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 
ELSE WGLRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY END  ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY 
,WGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT
,WGLRM.POB_TYPE_CD,
 WGLRM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG , /*agannava : NRS MPOB Change*/
 WGLRM.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG, /*agannava : NRS MPOB Change*/
/* Added below as part of  bridge table logic for SEP REL */
CAST (
TRIM(COALESCE(WGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || 
CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'SLS_ADJ' THEN TRIM(COALESCE(WGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) 
ELSE TRIM(COALESCE(WGLRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) END ||  '~' || 
TRIM(COALESCE(WGLRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' || 
CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'SLS_ADJ' THEN -9999  
ELSE TRIM(COALESCE(WGLRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)) END AS VARCHAR(70)) 
AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
,WGLRM.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG
,WGLRM.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD
/*Added as part of Accruals MERAKI Q2FY19*/
,CASE WHEN WGLRM.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY END ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY 
,CASE WHEN WGLRM.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY END MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
,CASE WHEN WGLRM.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM (1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WGLRM.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY END REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY
,WGLRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */ 
,WGLRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WGLRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
,WGLRM.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
,'=' NET_PRICE_FLG
,'=' CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
,-999 WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,'UNKNOWN' BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,WGLRM.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,CASE WHEN WGLRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-999 OR WGLRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY IS NULL THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  WHEN WGLRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1  WHEN WGLRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1  ELSE WGLRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END as DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,WGLRM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,WGLRM.DV_SALES_MOTION_RULE_NAME
 FROM $$WORKDB.W_GL_REV_MEASURE WGLRM
 WHERE NOT EXISTS 
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NGLRM 
 WHERE WGLRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY= NGLRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND WGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = NGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD 
 )

SELECT 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
SFH.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID        ,
SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
FY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
                ,CASE WHEN UNB.BNI_FHI_FLAG='FHI' AND UNB.AUTO_RELEASE_DT>=FY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN 'FHI' ELSE 'BNI' END FHI_BNI_FLG  
                ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT*COALESCE(SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,1) )  AMT
				,SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY,
                ,DV_SALES_MOTION_RULE
			FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE GL
            INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR FY  ON FY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
            INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS P ON P.ITEM_KEY =GL.PRODUCT_KEY 
            INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH ON SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
            INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_FIN_SALES_THEATER_HIER STH ON SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=STH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
            LEFT  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC SFH ON GL.PRODUCT_KEY=SFH.ITEM_KEY 
            INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE TRXL ON  GL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=TRXL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
            INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SO ON SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY =GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
            INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX TRX ON GL.AR_TRX_KEY =TRX.AR_TRX_KEY 
            INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOL ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =GL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
            INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV SOL1 ON SOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =GL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
            INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER VECPH ON VECPH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY =GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
            INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT VFFA ON GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD =VFFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE      		
			LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SOL_BNI_FHI_SNAPSHOT UNB ON GL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=UNB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
            AND FY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=UNB.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT_SNPSHOT 
        WHERE 
			GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED')
			AND GL.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'
            AND GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG ='Y' AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE IN ('CORP. REVENUE','UNKNOWN')
			AND GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_ID  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE)
			AND P.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD IN ('UNKNOWN','SON_HCL')
           -- AND P.DIVESTITURE_FLG ='N'
			AND DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y'
            AND  ((GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0 AND GL.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY < 0  
			AND TRXL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE='LINE' AND GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001','43310', '43320'))
                        OR (GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ' 
						AND  P.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID <> 'SERVICE')
                        OR GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T'
                        OR GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR-OOD'
                        OR (GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY > 0 AND GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001','43310', '43320'))
                        OR (GL.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY   > 0 AND GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001','43310', '43320'))
                        OR ( GL.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY > 0 AND GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001','43310', '43320') )    /*   CSPP CHANGES              */
                        OR ( GL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 AND GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001','43310', '43320') )               /*   ACCRUAL REVENUE CHANGES   */
                        OR ( GL.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 AND GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001','43310', '43320') )                /*    MERAKI CHANGES           */
                        OR ( GL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY > 0 AND GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001','43310', '43320') )
                        )
            -- AND CAST(SO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME AS DATE)< FY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
            -- AND CAST(TRX.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) >=FY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE  AND  TRX.AR_TRX_DATETIME <> '1900-01-01 00:00:00'
            AND TO_CHAR( SO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,'DD-MON-YYYY') <> '01-JAN-1900' AND TRUNC( SO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME ) < TRUNC( FY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE )
            AND TO_CHAR( TRX.AR_TRX_DATETIME,'DD-MON-YYYY') <> '01-JAN-1900' AND TRUNC( TRX.AR_TRX_DATETIME )  BETWEEN TRUNC( FY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE ) AND TRUNC( FY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE )
            AND SFH.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID IS NOT NULL
            AND GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'
            AND GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD NOT IN  ( 'AS INVOICED-FCM SERVICE'  )
        GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
       
		
		HAVING 
        (
        SUM(CASE WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD <>'IND_ADJ' THEN 
                        CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  BETWEEN '42701' AND '42799' AND GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('42750','42751','42755') THEN 0 
                             WHEN SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID IN ('AS SUBSCRIPTION', 'AS ROS','CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES') OR P.BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'ADVANCED SERVICES_ADJ_PROD' THEN 0
                             ELSE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT*COALESCE(SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,1)  
                        END
            ELSE 
                        CASE WHEN SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID = 'TSS-OTHER' THEN DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT*COALESCE(SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,1)  
                             ELSE 0
                         END 
            END 
           )<>0         
        OR 
        SUM(CASE WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD <>'IND_ADJ' THEN 
                        CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  BETWEEN '42701' AND '42799' AND GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('42750','42751','42755') THEN 0 
                             WHEN SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID = 'AS SUBSCRIPTION' OR P.BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'ADVANCED SERVICES_ADJ_PROD'  THEN  DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT*COALESCE(SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,1)  
                             ELSE 0
                        END
            ELSE 
                        CASE WHEN SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID = 'AS SUBSCRIPTION' THEN DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT*COALESCE(SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,1)  
                             ELSE 0
                         END 
            END 
           )<>0
        )

SELECT      
  MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,  
  MDSPD.PROCESS_DATE AS PROCESS_DATE ,  
  'SLS_ADJ' AS REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,   
  MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  
  FROM    
  $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL MDSPD  
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
	ON MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS'
	AND MDSPD.IDE_IFC_ADJ_REPORTING_TYPE_CD <>'M'
  WHERE MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES   WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_N_GL_REV_MEASURE' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT      
  MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,  
  MDSPD.PROCESS_DATE AS PROCESS_DATE ,  
  'SLS_ADJ' AS REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,   
  MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  
  FROM    
  $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL MDSPD
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
	ON  MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE<>'POS-OA'
  WHERE MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES   WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_N_GL_REV_MEASURE' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL')
UNION ALL
SELECT 
MDSPD.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, 
MDSPD.PROCESS_DT AS PROCESS_DATE,
'POS' AS REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DTLS_DEL MDSPD
WHERE MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_N_GL_REV_MEASURE' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DTLS_DEL')
